description_long: This is a dark stone relief sculpture depicting a multi-armed deity seated in a meditative pose, surrounded by smaller figures and intricate carvings. The central figure wears an ornate headdress and is positioned on a raised pedestal, with hands arranged in symbolic gestures. The upper section of the relief features additional smaller figures and decorative motifs, all carved in high relief. The back of the sculpture is flat and unadorned, indicating it is meant to be displayed against a wall or similar surface. The surface texture is rough and weathered, with visible chisel marks and natural stone variations. The overall form is arched at the top, tapering slightly towards the base.
description: A dark stone relief sculpture of a multi-armed deity seated in meditation, surrounded by smaller figures and intricate carvings, with a flat, unadorned back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the detailed relief of the multi-armed deity, ornate headdress, and surrounding figures, highlighting the intricate carvings and symbolic gestures.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the sculpture's shallow depth and high-relief carving, with most details projecting only slightly from the flat backing.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a flat, uncarved stone surface, indicating the sculpture is designed to be viewed only from the front.
description_view_3: The right side view, similar to the left, shows the thin profile and the extent of the relief work projecting from the flat backing.
attribute_subject_matter: multi-armed deity with surrounding figures in high relief
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
